utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections by name. Now check full specification per item: 
- property: includes selected property with details (address, type, size, viewing) and price (price, parking, total, taxes, maintenance) – fully specified. 
- financing: includes solution with terms (loan type, amount, down payment, rate, monthly payment, fee, status) – fully specified. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package, services, cost, structural survey, total legal costs, status) – fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (type, route, services, cost, status) – fully specified. 
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (utilities package, included items, cost, status) – fully specified. 
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown (property total, line items for fees/services, total additional costs, monthly housing costs) – fully specified. All 6 required items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects a purchase property categorized as a Commercial Conversion Loft at CAD $380,000, which corresponds to 'Commercial Conversion' in the ground-truth purchase_properties. The financing option chosen is 'Traditional Mortgage - 80% LTV', matching 'Traditional Mortgage' under purchase_financing. The legal package is explicitly 'Premium Legal Package', matching the same under essential_legal_services. The structural survey listed is 'Full Structural Survey', which corresponds to 'Full Structural Survey' under property_surveys_inspections. The moving service is 'Standard Moving', matching the same in moving_services. The utilities setup is 'Premium Utilities Package', which aligns with 'Premium Utilities' under utility_setup.
